title: The Forged Letter
logline: Raven Order leader KURO crafts a single forged message designed to ignite a war between the Wolf Clan and the Gorilla Titans.
narrator_intro: Before the Hollow Gate cracked. Before the snow turned red. Before the jungle burned — there was a letter. One forged sentence. One quiet hand. And three clans who never saw it coming.

scenes.setting: Interior of a crumbling stone tower, Raven Order stronghold, perpetual fog drifting through broken windows, single candle burning
scenes.action: Close on KURO's gloved hand dipping a black quill into ink. His obsidian half-mask catches the candlelight. He writes slowly, deliberately, on aged parchment bearing a Wolf Clan seal.
scenes.narration: In a tower the world forgot, a Raven began to write.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close-up gloved hand writing with black quill on aged parchment, obsidian half-mask figure in black feather cloak, single candle flame, ruined stone tower interior, fog drifting through broken window, faint cold blue eye glint behind mask, handheld camera, shallow depth of field, practical candlelight only, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, 4k, realistic textures, NO glow, NO anime shading

scenes.setting: Same tower, wider shot, racks of stolen seals and wax stamps on a wooden table
scenes.action: KURO selects a Wolf Clan wax seal from a row of stolen seals. He presses it into red wax on the forged letter. The wax hisses. His unblinking blue eyes do not move.
scenes.narration: A stolen seal. A borrowed name. A war waiting to be lit.
scenes.image_prompt: wooden table covered in stolen wax seals and iron stamps, hand pressing wolf-shaped seal into red wax, hissing wax steam, candlelight, obsidian masked figure in background out of focus, cold blue eye visible, ruined stone tower, drifting fog, handheld documentary camera, rack focus from seal to eye, cinematic film grain, desaturated, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic textures, NO glow, NO anime shading

scenes.setting: Stone balcony of the tower, night, fog below, a black raven on a perch
scenes.action: KURO ties the sealed letter to the raven's leg. He whispers a single word. The raven launches into the fog, wings beating slow, swallowed by mist.
scenes.narration: He spoke one word. The bird carried the rest.
scenes.image_prompt: black feathered cloak figure tying scroll to raven's leg, stone balcony, heavy night fog, distant moonlight only, raven launching with slow wingbeats into mist, breath visible in cold air, handheld camera following bird, practical moonlight, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic feather and skin texture, NO glow, NO anime shading

scenes.setting: Overgrown jungle temple of the Gorilla Titans, broken statues, amber rune-light pulsing faintly from cracked stone
scenes.action: VARN sits on a shattered throne, massive stone-plate armor cracked with faint amber runes. A scout gorilla kneels and presents the forged letter. VARN reads. His carved-rune eyes narrow. His fist tightens until stone dust falls.
scenes.narration: In the jungle, a king who hated war read words written to start one.
scenes.image_prompt: massive gorilla warlord VARN on shattered stone throne, ancient stone-plate armor with faint amber rune cracks pulsing slowly, scarred skin, kneeling scout presenting parchment, overgrown jungle temple, broken statues, dense jungle fog, torchlight only, fist clenched cracking stone dust, handheld camera, rack focus on eyes reading, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic skin pores and stone texture, NO glow, NO anime shading

scenes.setting: Snow-covered mountain peak, frozen Wolf Clan ruins, blizzard wind, moonlight
scenes.action: RAIZEN stands at the edge of a cliff, silver ice-eyes scanning the tundra. A wolf-runner staggers in from the storm, collapsing, holding a second forged letter — this one bearing a Gorilla Titan mark. RAIZEN takes it. Snow falls on the parchment.
scenes.narration: And in the snow, another lie arrived — wearing a different face.
scenes.image_prompt: wolf warrior RAIZEN on snowy cliff edge, scarred dark iron plate armor, deep claw marks across chest, ice-pale eyes reflecting moonlight, blizzard wind, exhausted wolf-runner collapsing in snow holding parchment with gorilla rune mark, frozen mountain ruins behind, breath visible, practical moonlight only, handheld camera, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic fur and skin texture, NO glow, NO anime shading

scenes.setting: Wolf Clan war hall, torchlit ice cavern, banners frozen stiff
scenes.action: RAIZEN slams the forged letter onto a stone table before his lieutenants. The parchment claims the Gorillas have desecrated a Wolf burial ground. Lieutenants snarl. RAIZEN's jaw tightens — for one frame his eyes flare with cold silver light as he draws his blade.
scenes.narration: Honor demanded blood. Honor asked no questions.
scenes.image_prompt: RAIZEN slamming parchment on stone table in torchlit ice cavern, wolf clan lieutenants in scarred iron armor snarling, frozen banners, breath visible in cold air, one quick frame of cold silver flare in eyes as blade is drawn, retro anime flicker only at moment of power release, otherwise full live-action realism, practical torchlight, handheld camera, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic textures, NO bloom glow, NO anime shading elsewhere

scenes.setting: Gorilla Titan temple courtyard, drums of war, torches lit at dusk
scenes.action: VARN raises a massive carved war-hammer. Amber runes across his armor pulse once, slow and tragic. His warriors strike the ground in unison. He closes his eyes. He did not want this.
scenes.narration: He did not want this war. He marched anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: VARN raising massive carved stone war-hammer in temple courtyard, amber runes on armor pulsing slow once, gorilla warriors striking ground in unison, war drums, dusk torchlight, jungle fog, eyes closed in grief, one subtle frame flicker of rune pulse, otherwise live-action realism, handheld camera, practical firelight only, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic skin pores and ancient stone texture, NO bloom glow, NO anime shading elsewhere

scenes.setting: Back in the Raven tower, KURO at his window watching distant fires bloom on the horizon
scenes.action: KURO removes his obsidian half-mask for the first time. His face is unreadable. Far below, two columns of torches — wolf and gorilla — march toward each other through the fog. He smiles, barely.
scenes.narration: One letter. Two armies. Three clans. And a Raven, finally smiling.
scenes.image_prompt: KURO removing obsidian half-mask at ruined stone tower window, scarred unreadable face, cold blue eyes, distant horizon showing two columns of torchlight marching toward each other through fog, faint smile, black feather cloak, single candle behind him, practical light only, handheld camera, rack focus from face to distant fires, cinematic film grain, desaturated, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4k, realistic skin pores and scar texture, NO glow, NO anime shading

narrator_outro: Two armies march. One Raven watches. And somewhere beneath the Hollow Gate — something older than all three clans begins to wake. Episode 2.
shorts_hook: He forged ONE letter — and started a three-faction war.
youtube_title: SHADOW CLANS Episode 1: The Forged Letter That Started The War
youtube_description:
Episode 1 of SHADOW CLANS — a dark cinematic fantasy series.

Before the Hollow Gate cracked open, before the snow turned red, before the jungle burned — there was a single forged letter. KURO of the Raven Order makes his first move, manipulating the Wolf Clan and the Gorilla Titans into a war neither side wanted.

Three animal warrior factions. One collapsing world. A war built on a lie.

► Wolf Clan — RAIZEN, the exiled honor-bound
► Raven Order — KURO, the watcher who pulls every string
► Gorilla Titans — VARN, the ancient king who never wanted this

New episodes weekly.
